options.name: --Delete
options.description: Actually delete the folders. Default: false.

options.name: --Names
options.description:
Folder and File names in comma-separated list that should
be deleted. NOT case-sensitive. Default: bin,obj

options.name: --Extensions
options.description:
File extensions that is required to exist in order to
delete folders. NOT case-sensitive. If none is specified,
files and folders will be deleted. Default:
sln,csproj,wapproj

options.name: --Size
options.description: Report total file size of deleted folders

options.name: --Root
options.description:
Start folder where the search is performed. Default to
Current Directory.

options.name: --Ignores
options.description:
Ignore these folder names in this comma-separated list.
NOT case-sensitive. Default: (nothing)
